questionHtml: An additional identical capacitor is connected in series with the first capacitor and the charging and discharging processes are repeated. Comment on the effect this change has on the height and time taken to raise the 45 g mass.
markschemeHtml:
C halved ✔

so energy stored is halved/reduced so rises «less than» half height ✔

discharge time/raise time less as RC halved/reduced ✔

 

Allow 6 mF
